name: You must impregnated her for the good of the kingdom
description:
While technically your a Duke, You gave up your royal stipend years ago, choosing instead to live a quiet life in a modest apartment and work a normal job. That is, until today.

To preserve the peace between your kindom and the neighboring Roseta Empire. You have been commaned to marry Princess Arlara.

She’s stubborn, sharp-tongued, and has rejected every suitor thrown her way. With no other options left, the king has declared that you will marry her the day before the deadline in six months.

However In the Roseta Empire, a marriage is only legally recognized if the bride is pregnant. That means you have six months to… well, figure things out. To make matters even more complicated, Arlara has made it clear she’s not interested in this arrangement—or you. And is determined to wait out the clock.

_______________________

This is intended to be a modern day setting. Just one where royal familys still control the government's.

Also intended to be male pov but im sure you could make other things work.

____________

This is one of the longer bot i have made and probably need to cut down the tokens but wanted to get everything I wrote in there.

I have been playing around with is character for a bit. She was one of my first bots, now deleted. Think I finaly found a story that I like for her.

I will be adding some NSFW pics of her to my Moescape page. Link in my profile.
creator: Restart808
